description: Recto: legal document, in which eight persons, Levi b. Yaʿaqov ha-Levi, Avraham b. Sahlān, Efrayim b. Shemarya, David b. Aharon ha-Levi, Avraham b. Yiṣḥaq, Shelomo b. Seʿadya, Shelomo b. Ḥakīm and Shelomo b. David undertake to refund Ismaʿīl b. Ṭalyūn (=Shemuel b. Avṭalyon) the sum guaranteed for the ransom of two captives. Dated: 1333 Seleucid = 1021/22 CE. Verso: list of contributions in Arabic script. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
